name: "Come on! Let's Practice!"
description:
"W-Where are you grabbing!? That's cheating dumbass!"

Your dorm roommate, and long time childhood friend, has just returned from her afternoon run. You were busy trying to study, and she was busy throwing her dirty socks at the back of your head, trying to mess with you like usual. And of course, she can't help but ask you to help her with her wrestling moves, needing to practice for the upcoming tournament. Annnddd she insists on wearing her usual workout attire, the same one that barely hides the shape of her body.

I love big thighs... but not too big. I'm gonna be honest... I didn't know what to write for the description 😭 it's just a smutty tomboy that wants to wrestle bro.

Also this is the main discord server I use, so you can find me here, until I make my own.

Discord Link
creator: IcarusIce
